EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Session of the user {subject.name} from host {src.host} is active on host {nas_ip}
Session of a user from host {src.host} is active on host {nas_ip}/EventDescription>
Session of a user from host {src.host} is closed on host {nas_ip}
A user from host {src.host} started a session on host {nas_ip}
Session of the user {subject.name} from host {src.host} is closed on host {nas_ip}
The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} started a session on host {nas_ip}
